name: Hope Hammer I
description:
A hammer made specifically for the
expedition. Its weight on top of
physical force can smash anything.

name: Hope Hammer II
description:
A hammer made specifically for the
expedition. Its weight on top of
physical force can smash anything.

name: Hope Hammer III
description:
A hammer made specifically for the
expedition. Its weight on top of
physical force can smash anything.

name: Hope Hammer IV
description:
A hammer made specifically for the
expedition. Its weight on top of
physical force can smash anything.

name: Hope Hammer V
description:
A hammer made specifically for the
expedition. Its weight on top of
physical force can smash anything.

name: Bone Bludgeon I
description:
A hammer that takes "bare-bones
design" literally. Sure, it's just
a bone...but it's YOUR bone.

name: Bone Bludgeon II
description:
A hammer that takes "bare-bones
design" literally. Sure, it's just
a bone...but it's YOUR bone.

name: Bone Bludgeon III
description:
A hammer that takes "bare-bones
design" literally. Sure, it's just
a bone...but it's YOUR bone.

name: Bone Bludgeon IV
description:
A hammer that takes "bare-bones
design" literally. Sure, it's just
a bone...but it's YOUR bone.

name: Heavy Bone Bludgeon
description:
Is it still just a bone? Yes.
But as a hammer, this improved
Bone Bludgeon has never hit
harder.

name: Iron Hammer I
description:
Long before hammers went
mainstream, there was a single
old hunter who swore by this
no-nonsense weapon.

name: Iron Hammer II
description:
Long before hammers went
mainstream, there was a single
old hunter who swore by this
no-nonsense weapon.

name: Iron Hammer III
description:
Long before hammers went
mainstream, there was a single
old hunter who swore by this
no-nonsense weapon.

name: Iron Devil
description:
Whatever fury hell hath, it must
feel a lot like the meaty,
monstrous swings of this
upgraded Iron Hammer.

name: Chata Clobberer I
description:
A hammer designed like the head
of a Chatacabra. The weight of its
jaw ensures that it packs a punch.

name: Chata Clobberer II
description:
A hammer designed like the head
of a Chatacabra. The weight of its
jaw ensures that it packs a punch.

name: Chata Clobberer III
description:
A hammer designed like the head
of a Chatacabra. The weight of its
jaw ensures that it packs a punch.

name: Chata Clobberer IV
description:
A hammer designed like the head
of a Chatacabra. The weight of its
jaw ensures that it packs a punch.

name: Balahara Hammer I
description:
A Balahara hammer.
Clad in steel, this hulking
weapon can break through
the most stubborn bedrock.

name: Balahara Hammer II
description:
A Balahara hammer.
Clad in steel, this hulking
weapon can break through
the most stubborn bedrock.

name: Balahara Hammer III
description:
A Balahara hammer.
Clad in steel, this hulking
weapon can break through
the most stubborn bedrock.

name: Balahara Hammer IV
description:
A Balahara hammer.
Clad in steel, this hulking
weapon can break through
the most stubborn bedrock.

name: Sandsea Siamitiya
description:
An upgraded Balahara Hammer.
Its impact shatters the earth's
crust, raising a cloud of dust.

name: Rompo Wrecker I
description:
A Rompopolo hammer. Its odd
shape resembles medical
equipment from a time of plague.

name: Rompo Wrecker II
description:
A Rompopolo hammer. Its odd
shape resembles medical
equipment from a time of plague.

name: Rompo Wrecker III
description:
A Rompopolo hammer. Its odd
shape resembles medical
equipment from a time of plague.

name: Rompo Robustox
description:
An upgraded Rompo Wrecker. It
gazes upon its victims with hollow
eyes as its lethal pecks fill them
with poison.

name: Cluster Hammer I
description:
A sleek hammer that is worthy
of the Nerscylla. It deploys a
needle-like protrusion when
drawn.

name: Cluster Hammer II
description:
A sleek hammer that is worthy
of the Nerscylla. It deploys a
needle-like protrusion when
drawn.

name: Cluster Hammer III
description:
A sleek hammer that is worthy
of the Nerscylla. It deploys a
needle-like protrusion when
drawn.

name: Nerscrapper
description:
A Cluster Hammer upgrade.
It is designed to crush
carapaces and gouge out
flesh with each blow.

name: Nu Pulpo I
description:
A Nu Udra hammer with a hidden
eye. At full power, the eye opens
to oversee its prey's demise.

name: Nu Pulpo II
description:
A Nu Udra hammer with a hidden
eye. At full power, the eye opens
to oversee its prey's demise.

name: Abaddonian Pulpo
description:
An upgraded Nu Pulpo. Any
prey that meets its hungry gaze
is gripped by a fear that only
death can cure.

name: Albirath Bludgeon I
description:
A Guardian Rathalos hammer.
Like a blazing fire, its wielder's
spirit never abates.

name: Albirath Bludgeon II
description:
A Guardian Rathalos hammer.
Like a blazing fire, its wielder's
spirit never abates.

name: Gibil Hammer
description:
An upgraded Albirath Bludgeon.
A regal soul rests within its
immaculate flood of power.

name: Jin Dhauda I
description:
A Jin Dahaad hammer. Its icy
blows freeze all obstacles before
shattering them to snowdust.

name: Precipice Logamtu
description:
An upgraded Jin Dhauda. Its impact
freezes targets so fast they won't
feel the pain of obliteration.

name: Nihil Hammer I
description:
A Xu Wu hammer that, with each
oppressive blow, banishes its
target's consciousness to the void.

name: Nihil Hammer II
description:
A Xu Wu hammer that, with each
oppressive blow, banishes its
target's consciousness to the void.

name: Zaccio's Execution
description:
An upgraded Nihil Hammer.
Those its gruesome blows hit
can only pray to retain some
semblance of form.

name: G. Veldian Malleus I
description:
A hammer made from Guardian
spoils. The aura of its designs
sharpens the mind and renders
time imperceptible.

name: G. Veldian Malleus II
description:
A hammer made from Guardian
spoils. The aura of its designs
sharpens the mind and renders
time imperceptible.

name: G. Exultant Bedivere
description:
An upgraded G. Veldian Malleus.
Whoever takes up this weapon is
assured victories beyond number.

name: Kut-Ku Pick I
description:
This limited Yian Kut-Ku hammer
sold out the day it hit the
market and has been impossible
to find since.

name: Kut-Ku Pick II
description:
This limited Yian Kut-Ku hammer
sold out the day it hit the
market and has been impossible
to find since.

name: Kut-Ku Thwap
description:
An upgraded Kut-Ku Pick...
Wait—one of these is up for grabs?!
Grab it! People will go Kut-Ku!

name: Venom Monster I
description:
A monstrous hammer, feared for
utilizing a specially concocted
poison that deviates from your
standard virulence.

name: Venom Monster II
description:
A monstrous hammer, feared for
utilizing a specially concocted
poison that deviates from your
standard virulence.

name: Death Venom Hammer
description:
An upgraded Venom Monster.
Laying hands on its poison
promises certain death.

name: Crashing Fulgur I
description:
A Guardian Fulgur Anjanath
hammer. Only one able to tame
its brutality through reason can
wield it.

name: Fulgurhammer Guardiana
description:
An upgraded Crashing Fulgur.
Its savage urges thwart reason and 
will destroy an overeager wielder.

name: Blan Gada I
description:
A Blangonga hammer.
Modeled after one wielded by
a simian god who commanded
intense worship.

name: Singha Gada
description:
A colder, enhanced Blan Gada.
Grants the strength of a simian
god who plucked mountains from
the earth.

name: Shell Hammer I
description:
A hammer that leverages its
highly heat-resistant Gravios
plating to generate a blast
with each swing.

name: Graviton Hammer
Matraca Hammer I
description:
A hammer forged from the scales
of Seregios, capable of reducing
foes to dust.

name: Argyl Hammer
description:
An upgraded Matraca Hammer.
The sign of a revolutionary,
as its strength seeks change.

name: Red Bludgeon I
description:
A Rathalos hammer, literally.
Only hunters who have shed their
fear of the wyvern may take it up.

name: Huracan Hammer
description:
An upgraded Red Bludgeon.
Blistering hot, it now bristles at
the thought of heeding any master.

name: Wuchtblick I
description:
A Gore Magala hammer shaped like a
grotesque skull, its evil eye
damned to stay closed for all time.

name: Grimmblick
description:
The Wuchtblick's next evolution.
Its evil eye widens, commencing the
world's return to nothingness...

name: Veldian Malleus I
description:
An Arkveld hammer. In the hands
of its knight wielder, it struck
blows with tenfold ferocity.

name: Jail Hammer I
description:
A unique hammer design that
utilizes Thunderbug discharges
to shock and paralyze monsters.

name: Jail Hammer II
description:
A unique hammer design that
utilizes Thunderbug discharges
to shock and paralyze monsters.

name: Jail Hammer III
description:
A unique hammer design that
utilizes Thunderbug discharges
to shock and paralyze monsters.

name: Jail Hammer IV
description:
A unique hammer design that
utilizes Thunderbug discharges
to shock and paralyze monsters.

name: Binder Mace
description:
A masterfully upgraded Jail Hammer
that defies the usual construction.
Paralyzes targets on the spot.

name: Artian Hammer I
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. No one
knows yet what the propulsion
mechanism was for.

name: Artian Hammer II
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. No one
knows yet what the propulsion
mechanism was for.

name: Moteurvankel
description:
An ancient weapon with latent
potential. Restored to full drive,
it stands ready to smash everything.

name: Esperanza Hammer
description:
A fully field-tested Hope Hammer.
Make your own hope—by crushing
anything that gets in your way.

name: Shrouded Aghaturi
description:
An upgraded Chata Clobberer.
When swung, it looks exactly
like a frog attempting to swallow
its prey.

name: Exultant Bedivere
description:
An upgraded Veldian Malleus. The
impossibly strong knight who bore
this could swing it with one hand.

name: Zoh Uria I
description:
A Zoh Shia hammer with a thick
outer shell that conceals the
merciless darkness within.

name: Blazing Uria
description:
Uria harketh from on high:
Thou who seekest phenomena,
may thy hammer bring thee
stillness.

name: Purity Hammer I
description:
A hammer passed down
from a princess who brought
peace by dispelling evil.

name: Sinter Hammer
description:
The Purity Hammer's enhanced
form is a guiding light for
a world lost in darkness.

name: Vortex Hammer I
description:
An electric hammer inspired
by the whirlpools Lagiacrus
create to destroy prey.

name: High Vortex Hammer
description:
An upgraded Vortex Hammer.
Its electric current has been
boosted for increased intensity.

name: Bound Admonition
description:
A grotesque soul that thirsts
for potential, encaged but
driven to find its true vessel.

name: Bound Admonition
description:
A grotesque soul that thirsts
for potential, encaged but
driven to find its true vessel.

name: Bound Admonition
description:
A grotesque soul that thirsts
for potential, encaged but
driven to find its true vessel.
